title: Conformity report of IPBES assessments with the data and knowledge management policy; Transformative Change Assessment
author: Gudde, Renske
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Conformity report of IPBES assessments with the data and knowledge management policy; Thematic assessment report of the underlying causes of biodiveristy loss and the determinants of transformative change and options for achieving the 2050 vision for biodiversity of the Intergovernmental Science-Policy Platform on Biodiversity and Ecosystem Services.  
 To ensure that the IPBES assessments are delivered in agreement with the IPBES data and knowledge management policy ( https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.3551078 ), the delivery protocol for assessment drafts ( https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.5509137 ) was created. An objective scorecard was designed, initially for the measuring of the conformity of the Values and Sustainable Use assessments, to determine how well this protocol is followed. Later, the Invasive Alien Species assessment was scored following this same scorecard. This report is based on the scorecard of the Transformative Change Assessment, and provides valuable insights into how well the IPBES data and knowledge management policy is currently implemented in IPBES products, and it highlights areas where the delivery protocol for assessment drafts could be improved.
